description: Style NoteThis fastrack watch gets a new season update in its styling and design details. For maximum impact, style this with your off-duty staples and throw on a few tonal accessories for added measure. This zingy time piece is sure to give a face-lift to your summer wardrobe!Product DetailsCase style:  Analog watch with steel square case Dial style: Black dial with orange and silver handsStrap style: Steel strap with black plastic links and a butterfly claspFeatures: Date apeture on the 6 hour mark and branding on the dial Water resistant 50 M that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 27 mmCase thickness: 4 mm
